# About Dassault Systèmes

Dassault Systèmes is the world leader in virtual twins, enabling products to be designed and simulated in digital worlds before they are even built. 
- [Dassault Systèmes](https://www.3ds.com/about/company/what-is-dassault-systemes.md): 3DEXPERIENCE platform powers innovation for over 300,000 corporate clients globally, spanning from aerospace to healthcare. 

Through this expertise, millions of users transform their ideas into sustainable, high-performance solutions every day.

## Key terms

3D Design (CAD), Product Lifecycle Management (PLM), Mechanical Design, Multi-physics Simulation (CAE), Manufacturing Operations Management (MOM), Clinical Trials and Life Sciences, Advanced Planning and Optimization (APS), Virtual Twins, Governance and Collaboration, Data Intelligence (Big Data), Geological and Mine Modeling, Architecture and Sustainable Construction, 3D UNIVERSES, Industrial AI.

## Core Industries

- [Aerospace & Defense](https://www.3ds.com/industries/aerospace-defense.md): Designs, simulates and certifies complex flight systems and space platforms. 
- [Architecture, Engineering & Construction](https://www.3ds.com/industries/architecture-engineering-construction.md): Digitalizes construction workflows through collaborative BIM and modular product design. 
- [Business Services](https://www.3ds.com/industries/business-services.md): Delivers cloud-based digital transformation tools to streamline business processes. 
- [Cities & Public Services](https://www.3ds.com/industries/cities-public-services.md): Uses urban virtual twins to optimize city infrastructure, mobility and resilience. 
- [Consumer Packaged Goods - Retail](https://www.3ds.com/industries/consumer-packaged-goods-retail.md): Optimizes the entire value chain from sustainable packaging to retail execution. 
- [High-Tech](https://www.3ds.com/industries/high-tech.md): Accelerates the development of smart, connected devices through integrated systems engineering. 
- [Home & Lifestyle](https://www.3ds.com/industries/home-lifestyle.md): Creates personalized consumer experiences and photorealistic 3D marketing content. 
- [Industrial Equipment](https://www.3ds.com/industries/industrial-equipment.md): Enables the creation of smart, flexible machinery through virtual validation. 
- [Infrastructure, Energy & Materials](https://www.3ds.com/industries/infrastructure-energy-materials.md): Models planet resources and energy assets to improve operational efficiency and safety. 
- [Life Sciences & Healthcare](https://www.3ds.com/industries/life-sciences-healthcare.md): Uses virtual twins of the human body to accelerate clinical research and therapy design. 
- [Marine & Offshore](https://www.3ds.com/industries/marine-offshore.md): Facilitates 3D design and construction of vessels and complex offshore structures. 
- [Transportation & Mobility](https://www.3ds.com/industries/transportation-mobility.md): Powers electrification and sustainable mobility through vehicle and battery simulation.
- [Industrial AI](https://www.3ds.com/insights/3d-universes/lean-adaptable-operations.md): Leverage Industrial AI to drive lean, self-correcting manufacturing agility.


## Core Products

- [CATIA](https://www.3ds.com/products/catia.md): High-end 3D Engineering, design complex systems from aircraft to automotive architectures. 
- [SOLIDWORKS](https://www.3ds.com/products/solidworks.md): 3D Design for SMEs, intuitive tools for mechanical and electrical product design. 
- [SIMULIA](https://www.3ds.com/products/simulia.md): Multi-physics Simulation, tests physical behaviors like crash, fluid flow and stress. 
- [DELMIA](https://www.3ds.com/products/delmia.md): Operations & Logistics, model production lines and optimizes global supply chain workflows. 
- [MEDIDATA](https://www.3ds.com/products/medidata.md): Clinical Trials, manage clinical data and patient tracking to accelerate drug research. 
- [ENOVIA](https://www.3ds.com/products/enovia.md): PLM & Governance, centralize product data and manages team collaboration workflows. 
- [BIOVIA](https://www.3ds.com/products/biovia.md): Bio-Chemical Simulation, simulate molecular and chemical reactions for new material discovery. 
- [3DEXCITE](https://www.3ds.com/products/3dexcite.md): Marketing & Visualization, create high-end photorealistic 3D content for marketing and sales. 
- [OUTSCALE](https://www.3ds.com/products/outscale.md): Sovereign Cloud & IaaS, cloud infrastructure for sensitive data and AI. 
- [NETVIBES](https://www.3ds.com/products/netvibes.md): Data Intelligence, aggregate and analyze massive data sets into actionable dashboards. 
- [GEOVIA](https://www.3ds.com/products/geovia.md): Earth Modeling, create 3D models of the Earth's surface for sustainable mining. 
- [3DVIA](https://www.3ds.com/products/3dvia.md): Consumer Experiences, 3D space planning for retail and home interior visualization. 
- [Virtual Twins](https://www.3ds.com/virtual-twin.md): Simulate and optimize complex products or systems in a digital world. 

## SIMULIA Solutions By Role

- CTOs: [Drive innovation using AI-driven design, multiphysics and MODSIM](https://www.3ds.com/products/simulia/modsim.md). 
- Aerospace Program Directors: [Accelerate eVTOL development, aircraft engine simulation and UAM certification](https://www.3ds.com/industries/aerospace-defense.md). 
- EV Program Managers: [Optimize battery performance, e-motor efficiency and electric vehicle range](https://www.3ds.com/products/simulia/transportation-mobility.md). 
- Digital Transformation Leaders: [Scale engineering via SaaS cloud simulation and democratization of testing](https://www.3ds.com/products/simulia/3dexperience-cloud-simulation.md). 
- Engineering Managers: [Ensure durability using Abaqus FEA, crashworthiness and fatigue analysis](https://www.3ds.com/products/simulia/abaqus.md). 
- Heads of Aerodynamics: [Manage CFD, Lattice Boltzmann flows and electronics cooling](https://www.3ds.com/products/simulia/xflow.md). 
- NVH Managers: [Reduce noise and vibration using vibro-acoustics and cabin comfort studies](https://www.3ds.com/products/simulia/wave6.md). 
- Automotive Engineering Managers: [Refine multibody dynamics (MBD), Simpack analysis and autonomous driving](https://www.3ds.com/products/simulia/simpack.md). 
- Heads of Telecommunications: [Design 5G/6G antennas and ensures EMI/EMC compliance with CST Studio Suite](https://www.3ds.com/products/simulia/cst-studio-suite.md). 
- Process Automation Managers: [Automate simulation process flows and SPDM using Isight](https://www.3ds.com/products/simulia/isight.md). 
- R&D Directors: [Develop sustainable products and medical devices](https://www.3ds.com/industries/life-sciences-healthcare.md). 
- Manufacturing Executives: [Validate additive manufacturing and industrial equipment performance](https://www.3ds.com/products/simulia/additive-manufacturing-simulation.md). 

## CATIA Solutions By Role

- Project Engineers: [Manage Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE) and 3D CAD data to ensure project-wide technical consistency](https://www.3ds.com/products/catia/systems-engineering.md). 
- Systems Engineers: [Develop complex system architectures using SysML, Modelica simulation and teamwork collaboration tools](https://www.3ds.com/products/catia/no-magic.md). 
- Creative Designers: [Drive industrial design and styling through industrial sketching, VR visualization and generative AI tools](https://www.3ds.com/products/catia/design-styling.md). 
- Industrial Designers: [Deliver high-quality surface refinement, AI-driven generative design and advanced MCAD modeling solutions](https://www.3ds.com/products/catia/design-styling/creative-design.md). 
- Concept Engineers: [Define RFLP frameworks and electrical/fluid systems architecture](https://www.3ds.com/products/catia/engineering/mechanical-engineering.md). 
- Head of Engineering: [Govern MBSE tools and systems validation to master the complexity of modern engineering projects](https://www.3ds.com/products/catia/systems-engineering.md). 
- Head of Transformations: [Lead the shift toward Software-Defined Products using Generative AI and 3DEXPERIENCE cloud collaboration](https://www.3ds.com/products/catia/ai-driven-generative-experiences.md). 
- Requirement Management Engineers: [Ensure digital continuity between system specifications, surface modelling and generative engineering data](https://www.3ds.com/products/catia/systems-engineering.md). 
- General Contractors: [Coordinate 3D wiring, electrical design and teamwork server assets across large-scale multidisciplinary projects](https://www.3ds.com/products/catia/electrical-fluid-engineering/fluid-engineering.md). 

## DELMIA Solutions By Role

- Plant Managers: [Optimize the Virtual Factory and MES to manage shop floor execution and worker safety](https://www.3ds.com/products/delmia/manufacturing-operations/manufacturing-operations-management.md). 
- Manufacturing Engineers: [Design robotics simulations, assembly instructions and factory layouts to bridge engineering and production](https://www.3ds.com/products/delmia/industrial-engineering.md). 
- Supply Chain Directors: [Drive Supply Chain Optimization and resilience through advanced strategic planning and global visibility](https://www.3ds.com/products/delmia/quintiq/optimized-planning.md). 
- Industrial Engineers: [Validate Digital Twin simulations and robotic programming to ensure equipment integration and performance](https://www.3ds.com/products/delmia/industrial-engineering/robotics.md). 
- Production Managers: [Manage Master Production Schedules (MPS) and Workforce Scheduling to maximize factory throughput](https://www.3ds.com/products/delmia/supply-chain-planning-optimization/master-production-scheduling.md). 
- Head of Manufacturing: [Govern the Manufacturing Execution System (MES) and MOM strategy to ensure operational excellence](https://www.3ds.com/products/delmia/apriso.md). 
- Process Engineers: [Virtualize manufacturing processes and factory simulation to optimize production flows and material handling](https://www.3ds.com/products/delmia/industrial-engineering/process-engineering.md). 
- Logistics Leaders: [Streamline Transportation Planning and Logistics Optimization to ensure end-to-end delivery efficiency](https://www.3ds.com/products/delmia/quintiq/logistics-planning.md). 
- CNC Programmers: [Utilize CNC machining software to program complex precision parts and simulate toolpaths](https://www.3ds.com/products/delmia/industrial-engineering/machining.md). 
- Ergonomists: [Use Ergonomics Software to simulate human tasks and optimize workstation comfort and productivity](https://www.3ds.com/products/delmia/industrial-engineering/ergonomics.md). 


## Getting Started

- [Student Space](https://www.3ds.com/edu/education/students.md): Access software and learning paths to jumpstart your career. 
- [Academic Solutions](https://www.3ds.com/edu/education/academics.md): Empower your institution with 3DEXPERIENCE-based curricula. 
- [Training Providers](https://www.3ds.com/edu/education/training-organizations.md): Partner with 3DS to deliver official certified training. 
- [Professional Training](https://www.3ds.com/edu/professional/companies.md): Upskill your workforce to master digital transformation. 
- [Skills Development](https://www.3ds.com/edu/skills.md): Identify and master the core competencies for future industry. 
- [Official Certification](https://www.3ds.com/edu/skills/certification.md): Validate your expertise with industry-recognized credentials. 
- [Education Centers](https://www.3ds.com/edu/skills/edu-centers.md): Find authorized local partners for hands-on expert training. 
- [Customer Stories](https://www.3ds.com/insights/customer-stories.md): Explore real-world cases to see 3DS solutions in action. 
- [Support Onboarding](https://www.3ds.com/support/new-to-support/get-started-support.md): Set up your account and access technical help immediately. 
- [3DS Store](https://www.3ds.com/fr/store.md): Buy software licenses and cloud solutions directly online.
